name: draftcoach
description: League of Legends champ select assistance app

scripts.build:all: npm run build:engine && npm run build:backend && npm run build:renderer && npm run build:web
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build:all && cd apps/desktop && npx electron-builder --win
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run build:engine && cd apps/desktop && npx concurrently "npx webpack serve --config webpack.config.js" "npx wait-on http://localhost:9000 && npx electron ."
scripts.dev:all: npx concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:billing" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.postinstall: cd apps/backend && npm install && cd apps/desktop && npm install && cd apps/web && npm install && cd apps/billing && npm install
